# Pipeline runtime requirements for the bundled Python sidecar.
# Generated with pip-compile --generate-hashes from requirements.in
# (a verbatim snapshot of the prior pinned list). Pinned wheel hashes
# enforce supply-chain integrity at install time — pip refuses any
# wheel whose sha256 does not appear here. Used by
# app/scripts/setup-bundled-python.sh which installs with
# --require-hashes implicit (every line carries hashes).
#
# To regenerate after a dep bump:
#   pip install pip-tools
#   cp engine/requirements.txt /tmp/req.in
#   pip-compile --generate-hashes --output-file=engine/requirements.txt /tmp/req.in
